zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Sire de Grancey於大約1235年出生在法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧時，他的父親Eude de Grancey III38歲，母親Elisabeth de Champlitte29歲。他於1252年與Isabelle de Til-Chatel結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume Sire de Grancey于大约1235年出生在法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧时，他的父亲Eude de Grancey III38岁，母亲Elisabeth de Champlitte29岁。他于1252年与Isabelle de Til-Chatel结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Sire de Grancey was born about 1235, in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Eude de Grancey III, was 38 and his mother, Elisabeth de Champlitte, was 29. He married Isabelle de Til-Chatel in 1252. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1297, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Sire de Grancey est né environ 1235, à Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Eude de Grancey III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Champlitte, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Til-Chatel en 1252. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1297, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Sire de Grancey um 1235 in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eude de Grancey III 38 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Champlitte 29. Er hat 1252 Isabelle de Til-Chatel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Sire de Grancey è nato il circa 1235 nel Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Eude de Grancey III, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Champlitte, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Til-Chatel nel 1252. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1297, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Sire de Granceyが約1235年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Eude de Grancey IIIは38歳，母Elisabeth de Champlitteは29歳であった。1252年にIsabelle de Til-Chatelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Sire de Grancey(이)가 대략 1235년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eude de Grancey III(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Champlitte(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1252년 Isabelle de Til-Chatel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Sire de Grancey nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Eude de Grancey III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Champlitte, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Til-Chatel em 1252. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1297, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Sire de Grancey родился около 1235 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eude de Grancey III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Champlitte, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Til-Chatel в 1252 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1297 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Sire de Grancey nació aproximadamente 1235, en Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Eude de Grancey III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Champlitte, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Til-Chatel en 1252. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1297, a la edad de 63 años.
